themes.reasoning_notes: Aura that enchants a creature and wants repeated attacks; its core deckbuilding home is aura-based combat shells.
Sacrificing the Aura makes target player discard two cards, giving aura decks an attached discard payoff.
It adds +1/+1 counters on each attack, but counters are mostly a means to trigger the sacrifice clause.
